tx_general_ai_deployment.description: A person develops or deploys an AI system in Texas

tx_state_agency_ai_notice.description: State-agency notice context for AI use or contemplated use

obligations.content: Provide transparency regarding risks in the development, deployment, and use of the AI system.
Provide reasonable notice regarding the use or contemplated use of AI systems by state agencies.

notes: This rule is broad and does not depend on healthcare-specific facts.
The state-agency notice obligation is surfaced separately when the facts indicate a state-agency context.
